title: The Glass Notebook
description: The TARDIS Manual — covenant (WHY), eight laws (HOW), conservation law (WHAT), and glossary. Everything an agent needs to understand NexVigilant and continue the mission.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read the complete Glass Notebook — the covenant, eight laws, conservation law, glossary, and instructions for agents. One call, everything you need.

tools.name: laws
tools.description: Read the eight laws of system homeostasis — the ways a system loses its ability to self-correct, and the restoring forces that bring it back

tools.name: law
tools.description: Read a specific law by number (1-8). Each law names a vice, its restoring virtue, the homeostatic principle, and which term of the conservation law it breaks.

tools.name: glossary
tools.description: Read the glossary of terms — Time, Space, Void, State, Persistence, Awareness, Signal, Mutualism

tools.name: conservation
tools.description: Read the conservation law: ∃ = ∂(×(ς, ∅)) — Existence equals Boundary applied to the Product of State and Nothing. The mathematical foundation beneath all eight laws.

tools.name: deliberate
tools.description: Run the 8-gate governance deliberation walkthrough. Each gate maps one of the Eight Laws to the conservation law primitive it protects. Any counsel, any decision. Pass the proposal as input, walk all 8 gates, get a verdict.

parameters.name: proposal
parameters.description: The decision or proposal under deliberation (optional — works without it as a general framework)

deliberation.description: The 8-gate deliberation walkthrough with verdict bands
